response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES, AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. THIS GIVES US 80 DIVIDED BY 2, EQUAL TO 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. NOW, WE WILL COUNT THE WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. THE WORD "ANGEL" APPEARS 1 TIME, "TOTAL" 1 TIME, "LETTERS" 1 TIME, "MOST" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "CONTAIN" 1 TIME, " EACH" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPE" 1 TIME, "THEIR" 1 TIME, "REMAINING" 1 TIME, "20" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "SMALL" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "NUMBER" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPE" 1 TIME, "THEIR" 1 TIME, "REMAINING" 1 TIME, "20" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "SMALL" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "NUMBER" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPE" 1 TIME, "THEIR" 1 TIME, "REMAINING" 1 TIME, "20" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "SMALL" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "NUMBER" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME
